name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Iconic Medium By The Way Soft Handbag, upgraded for the 2024-25 Fall/Winter show, featuring a soft and lightweight look. Jacquard fabric material, adorned with the iconic brown FF pattern. Interior features fabric lining, dark brown calfskin details, and gold hardware. Custom charm and knotted long zipper pull. This bag comes with a top handle and adjustable, detachable, knotted shoulder strap, for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody
Size 29.17.13
128
